allow: Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\)\); console.log\('ok:',d.ok,'| campaigns:',d.campaigns?.length,'| chartData:',d.chartData?.length,'| error:',d.error??'none'\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const d=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\)\); console.log\('ok:',d.ok,'| campaigns:',d.campaigns?.length,'| chartData:',d.chartData?.length\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const cfg = require\('./tailwind.config.js'\); const s = cfg.theme.extend.colors.surface; console.log\('Surface palette:', JSON.stringify\(s, null, 2\)\); const sh = cfg.theme.extend.boxShadow; console.log\('Has glow-sm:', !!sh['glow-sm']\); console.log\('Has neon \(old\):', sh['glow'].includes\('rgba\(99,102,241,0.22\)'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('src/app/globals.css','utf8'\); console.log\('radial-gradient in body:', css.includes\('radial-gradient\(ellipse 1400px'\)\); console.log\('gradient in btn-primary:', css.includes\('linear-gradient\(135deg, #4f46e5 0%, #7c3aed'\)\); console.log\('glow-ring neon removed:', !css.includes\('0 0 12px rgba\(99,102,241,0.15\)'\)\); console.log\('zinc shimmer present:', css.includes\('rgba\(39,39,42,0.50\)'\)\); console.log\('tokens.css exists:', fs.existsSync\('src/app/tokens.css'\)\);")
